moments.title: Commonwealth Games in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are currently underway, running from July 23rd to August 2nd, showcasing elite sport and inclusive competition across four major venues in Glasgow.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games are in full flow, bringing together athletes from 74 nations. What event are you glued to? #CommonwealthGames2026

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are lighting up Glasgow! Big shout out to all the Scottish athletes and the incredible hosts. Go Team Scotland! #Glasgow2026

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Tee-Off
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open golf championship begins next week, running from July 29th to August 2nd at Royal Lytham & St Annes in England.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: Ready for some world-class golf? The AIG Women's Open kicks off next week at Royal Lytham & St Annes. Who are you backing for the title?

moments.title: UK Festivals Heating Up
moments.blurb: Several major UK music festivals are happening this weekend and next week, including Latitude, Truck, Together Again, Y-Not, Camp Bestival, and Belladrum Tartan Heart.

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Sun's out, well, sometimes! And the festivals are ON. Who's at Latitude, Truck, or Together Again this weekend? Let us know!

angles.name: Next Week's Festivals
angles.copy: Looking ahead to next week? Y-Not, Camp Bestival, and Belladrum Tartan Heart are all kicking off! Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: Sweet Caroline Back in UK Top 40
moments.blurb: Neil Diamond's classic 'Sweet Caroline' has re-entered the UK Official Singles Chart Top 40 at No. 35, fueled by its popularity during the recent World Cup excitement.

angles.name: Chart Comeback
angles.copy: You just can't keep a good song down! Neil Diamond's 'Sweet Caroline' is back in the UK Top 40. Still got it! #SweetCaroline

angles.name: World Cup Anthem
angles.copy: From stadiums to the charts! 'Sweet Caroline' is riding high again thanks to its World Cup singalong status. Instant classic.

moments.title: New Drama 'Furious' on Disney+
moments.blurb: The gripping new drama 'Furious', a thriller about a female serial killer and a flawed FBI agent, premieres on Disney+ in the UK on Monday, July 27th.

angles.name: New TV Thriller
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? New drama 'Furious' lands on Disney+ Monday. Sounds like a proper nail-biter!

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Saturday. What's your favourite Stones track to blast out? #MickJagger

moments.title: Roger Taylor Turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor will celebrate his 77th birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Drummer Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 77th to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Saturday! Keep on drumming! #RogerTaylor

moments.title: Kate Bush Turns 68
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential singer-songwriter Kate Bush will celebrate her 68th birthday on Wednesday, July 30th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights
angles.copy: Running up that hill to wish Kate Bush a very happy 68th birthday on Wednesday! What's your favourite track from the legend? #KateBush

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ Fatboy Slim, will celebrate his 63rd birthday on Thursday, July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Right here, right now! Happy 63rd birthday to the legendary Fatboy Slim this Thursday. What's his ultimate dance floor filler for you? #FatboySlim

moments.title: Daniel Ash Turns 69
moments.blurb: Guitarist Daniel Ash, known for his work with Bauhaus, Tones on Tail, and Love and Rockets, celebrates his 69th birthday on Thursday, July 31st.

angles.name: Goth Rock Icon
angles.copy: Shout out to Daniel Ash of Bauhaus and Love and Rockets, turning 69 this Thursday! Still rocking after all these years. #DanielAsh

moments.title: UK Summer Weather: Mixed Bag
moments.blurb: The UK's late July weather forecast indicates a mix of warm days and cooler spells, with a low risk of a long-lasting heatwave but potential for short bursts of hot weather, particularly in the Southeast where London could reach 31°C by July 29th.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Classic British summer! A mix of sunshine and showers on the cards for late July. Keep that brolly AND the suncream handy!

angles.name: London Heat
angles.copy: Londoners, get ready for some heat! Temperatures could hit 31°C next week. Stay cool out there!
